text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
choice_data_list: You seem really motivated this year too!
You seem really motivated this year too!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. After all, I am preparing for the autumn
Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Now that I've conquered the spring Tenno Sho,
my desire to win both spring and autumn in
succession has grown all the stronger!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I shall hone my skills even more this summer camp
so I may achieve a spectacular victory for the
Mejiro family!
choice_data_list: I'll do everything I can to support you!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. I'll do whatever it takes. I don't care
how strict your training is!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Create a regimen that will ensure my victory in
the upcoming autumn Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen and I begin our final summer
camp together!
